controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies- acquisition of shareholding or control) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies- Acquisition of Shareholding or Control) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies- acquisition of shareholding or control) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure become effective from the date of issue
controls.control_description: These directions shall become effective from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become effective from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as 'an nbfc'), for al
controls.control_description:
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to the following Non-Banking Financial
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as 'an
NBFC'), for all layers:
Note: The applicability under these Directions is in line with the regulatory structure for
NBFCs as set out in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as 'an nbfc'), for al

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the following:
controls.control_description:
(i) The provisions given in Paragraph 6 to 13, except 6(3) and 6(4), shall apply to
the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to hfcs
controls.control_description: (ii) The provisions contained in Paragraph 6(3) shall be applicable to HFCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to hfcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to spd registered with the rbi as nbfc under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to spd registered with the rbi as nbfc under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below, and their cognate expressions and variations shall be construed accordingly: (1) 'control' shall have the sa
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms used shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below, and their cognate expressions and
variations shall be construed accordingly:
(1) 'control' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under clause (e) of sub-
regulation (1) of regulation 2 of Securities and Exchange Board of India
(Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below, and their cognate expressions and variations shall be construed accordingly: (1) 'control' shall have the sa

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as contained in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies- acceptance of public deposits) directions, 2025
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as contained in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies- acceptance of public deposits) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to it under clause 77 of section 2 of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(3) 'relative' shall have the meaning assigned to it under clause 77 of section 2 of
the Companies Act, 2013;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to it under clause 77 of section 2 of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meanings assigned to them under the rbi act, 1934, the companies act, 1956 or the companies act, 2013 (act 18 of 2013)
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the meanings assigned to
them under the RBI Act, 1934, the Companies Act, 1956 or the Companies Act,
2013 (Act 18 of 2013).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meanings assigned to them under the rbi act, 1934, the companies act, 1956 or the companies act, 2013 (act 18 of 2013)

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior written permission of the reserve bank for the following: (1) any takeover or acquisition of control of the nbfc, which may or may not r
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall require prior written permission of the Reserve Bank for the
following:
(1) Any takeover or acquisition of control of the NBFC, which may or may not result
in change of management;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior written permission of the reserve bank for the following: (1) any takeover or acquisition of control of the nbfc, which may or may not r

controls.control_objective: To ensure , prior approval would not be required in case of any shareholding going beyond 26 percent due to buyback of shares/reduction in capital where it has
controls.control_description:
Provided that, prior approval would not be required in case of any shareholding
going beyond 26 percent due to buyback of shares/reduction in capital where it has
approval of a competent Court.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , prior approval would not be required in case of any shareholding going beyond 26 percent due to buyback of shares/reduction in capital where it has

controls.control_objective: To ensure , prior approval would not be required in case of any shareholding going beyond 10 per cent, as applicable, due to buyback of shares/ reduction in cap
controls.control_description:
(3) any change in the shareholding of an HFC accepting / holding public deposits,
including progressive increases over time, which would result in acquisition /
transfer of shareholding of 10 per cent or more of the paid-up equity capital of the
HFC by / to a foreign investor
Provided that, prior approval would not be required in case of any shareholding
going beyond 10 per cent, as applicable, due to buyback of shares/ reduction in
capital where it has approval of a competent Court.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , prior approval would not be required in case of any shareholding going beyond 10 per cent, as applicable, due to buyback of shares/ reduction in cap

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in cases of acquisition or transfer of control of hfcs holding cor valid for accepting public deposits, the reserve bank reserves the right to revie
controls.control_description:
Further, provided that, in cases of acquisition or transfer of control of HFCs holding
CoR valid for accepting public deposits, the Reserve Bank reserves the right to
review the grant of permission to accept public deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in cases of acquisition or transfer of control of hfcs holding cor valid for accepting public deposits, the reserve bank reserves the right to revie

controls.control_objective: To ensure need prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(4) Any change in the shareholding pattern / capital structure of a SPD shall need
prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to need prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure report any other material changes such as business profile, organization, etc
controls.control_description:
SPDs shall report any other material changes
such as business profile, organization, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report any other material changes such as business profile, organization, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an application, through pravaah, in the company's letter head, for obtaining prior approval of the reserve bank, along with the following docum
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall submit an application, through PRAVAAH, in the company's letter
head, for obtaining prior approval of the Reserve Bank, along with the following
documents:
(1) information about the proposed shareholders as per Annex I;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an application, through pravaah, in the company's letter head, for obtaining prior approval of the reserve bank, along with the following docum

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given in at least one leading national and in one leading local (covering the place of registered office) vernacular newspaper, at least 30 days be
controls.control_description:
Without prejudice to the requirements in the paragraph 6, a public notice shall be
given in at least one leading national and in one leading local (covering the place
of registered office) vernacular newspaper, at least 30 days before effecting: (i) the
transfer of the ownership of the company by sale of shares, or (ii) transfer of control
of the company, with or without sale of shares.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given in at least one leading national and in one leading local (covering the place of registered office) vernacular newspaper, at least 30 days be

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in case of any change in shareholding of an hfc accepting/ holding public deposits, including progressive increases over time, which would resul
controls.control_description:
Provided that nothing contained in this paragraph shall apply in case of any change
in shareholding of an HFC accepting/ holding public deposits, including progressive
increases over time, which would result in acquisition/ transfer of shareholding of
10 per cent or more and less than 26 per cent of the paid-up equity capital of the
HFC by/to a foreign investor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in case of any change in shareholding of an hfc accepting/ holding public deposits, including progressive increases over time, which would resul

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given by the nbfc and also by the transferee party or jointly by the parties concerned, after obtaining the prior permission of the rbi
controls.control_description:
The public notice required in paragraph 8 shall be given by the NBFC and also by
the transferee party or jointly by the parties concerned, after obtaining the prior
permission of the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given by the nbfc and also by the transferee party or jointly by the parties concerned, after obtaining the prior permission of the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure indicate the intention to sell or transfer ownership/ control, the particulars of transferee and the reasons for such sale or transfer of ownership/ c
controls.control_description:
The public notice shall indicate the intention to sell or transfer ownership/ control,
the particulars of transferee and the reasons for such sale or transfer of ownership/
control.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to indicate the intention to sell or transfer ownership/ control, the particulars of transferee and the reasons for such sale or transfer of ownership/ c

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated at par with that from the fatf compliant jurisdictions
controls.control_description:
Investments in an NBFC from FATF non-compliant jurisdictions shall not be treated
at par with that from the FATF compliant jurisdictions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated at par with that from the fatf compliant jurisdictions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to as a fatf compliant jurisdiction
controls.control_description:
A jurisdiction, whose name does not
appear in the two aforementioned lists, shall be referred to as a FATF compliant
jurisdiction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to as a fatf compliant jurisdiction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to directly or indirectly acquire 'significant influence' in the investee, as defined in the applicable accounting standards
controls.control_description:
A new investor from or through non-compliant FATF jurisdictions, whether in an
existing NBFC or in a company seeking Certificate of Registration, shall not be
allowed to directly or indirectly acquire 'significant influence' in the investee, as
defined in the applicable accounting standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to directly or indirectly acquire 'significant influence' in the investee, as defined in the applicable accounting standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the threshold of 20 per cent of the voting power (including potential voting power) of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
Consequently, fresh investors
(directly or indirectly) from such jurisdictions in aggregate should be less than the
threshold of 20 per cent of the voting power (including potential voting power) of
the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be less than the threshold of 20 per cent of the voting power (including potential voting power) of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that new investments from fatf non-compliant jurisdictions are less than both (a) 20 per cent of the existing voting powers and (b) 20 per
controls.control_description:
In such cases, it should be ensured that new investments from
FATF non-compliant jurisdictions are less than both (a) 20 per cent of the existing
voting powers and (b) 20 per cent of existing and potential voting powers assuming
those potential voting rights have materialised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that new investments from fatf non-compliant jurisdictions are less than both (a) 20 per cent of the existing voting powers and (b) 20 per

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue with the investments or bring in additional investments as per extant regulations so as to support continuity of business in india
controls.control_description:
An investor in an existing NBFC holding their investments prior to the classification
of the source or intermediate jurisdiction/s as FATF non-compliant, may continue
with the investments or bring in additional investments as per extant regulations so
as to support continuity of business in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue with the investments or bring in additional investments as per extant regulations so as to support continuity of business in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions and guidelines shall continue
to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments
granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: 1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: 1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure from accepting deposits/ prosecuted by rbi 18
controls.control_description: Name/s of the NBFCs, if any, with which the person is associated as Promoter, Managing Director, Chairman or Director, which has been prohibited from accepting deposits/ prosecuted by RBI 18.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to from accepting deposits/ prosecuted by rbi 18

controls.control_objective: To ensure from accepting deposits/ prosecuted by rbi 13
controls.control_description: Specify the names of companies in the Group which have been prohibited from accepting deposits/ prosecuted by RBI 13.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to from accepting deposits/ prosecuted by rbi 13
